datasets.label: London Ambulance Service
datasets.description: 5,042 LSOAs across Greater London. 1.06 M annual incidents (borough-level disaggregated to LSOA), 63 station candidates, 7 super-facility candidates (5 sector HQs + 2 EOCs). Sampling chain (always_accept) for 1,000 steps; w=8,450, ε=0.30, c_min=1.

datasets.label: 20 x 20 grid
datasets.description: 400-node synthetic grid. Demonstrates the algorithm on a moderately sized planar graph; longer chain shows ensemble convergence of boundary and facility frequencies.
